targets.rawSql:
SELECT                                                                                      
      -- Dados da Usina                                                                       
      m.power_plant_id,                                                                       
      m.power_plant_name,                                                                     
      m.power_plant_status,                                                                   
      m.location,                                                                             
      ROUND(m.rated_power_kw, 0) AS rated_power_kw,                                           
      ROUND(m.active_power_kw, 2) AS active_power_kw,                                         
      ROUND(m.daily_energy_kwh, 2) AS daily_energy_kwh,                                       
      ROUND(m.inverter_availability_pct, 1) AS inverter_availability_pct,                     
      ROUND(m.rates_availability_pct, 1) AS relay_availability_pct,                           
      ROUND(m.pr_pct * 100, 1) AS pr_pct,                                                           
                                                                                              
      -- Dados da Estação Meteorológica                                                       
      ROUND(w.irradiance_ghi::numeric, 2) AS irradiance_ghi,                                  
      ROUND(w.irradiance_poa::numeric, 2) AS irradiance_poa,                                  
      ROUND(w.air_temperature::numeric, 1) AS air_temperature,                                
      ROUND(w.module_temperature::numeric, 1) AS module_temperature,                          
      w.rain_signal AS rain_signal,                                                           
      TO_CHAR(w.timestamp, 'DD/MM HH24:MI') AS weather_last_update                            
                                                                                              
  FROM dbt.mart_power_plants_overview m                                                       
  LEFT JOIN dbt.int_weather_station_latest_readings w                                         
      ON m.power_plant_id = w.power_plant_id                                                  
                                                                                              
  WHERE m.power_plant_id::TEXT = '${power_plant_id}'

targets.rawSql:
WITH inverter_data AS (
    SELECT
        d.cabin,
        d.power_plant_id,
        d.id as device_id,
        d.device_name,
        'inverter' as device_type,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT ROUND(value_numeric::numeric, 2)
             FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings r
             WHERE r.device_id = d.id AND r.field_name = 'Active Power'
             LIMIT 1),
            0
        ) AS active_power,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT value_numeric::integer
             FROM dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings r
             WHERE r.device_id = d.id AND r.field_name = 'State: Simplified'
             LIMIT 1),
            0
        ) AS state_simplified,
        (SELECT ROUND(SUM(r2.value_numeric)::numeric, 2)
         FROM public.tb_devices d2
         INNER JOIN dbt.int_inverter_latest_readings r2 ON r2.device_id = d2.id
         INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt2 ON d2.device_type_id = dt2.id
         WHERE dt2.name = 'inverter'
           AND d2.is_active = true
           AND d2.power_plant_id = d.power_plant_id
           AND d2.cabin = d.cabin
           AND r2.field_name = 'Active Power'
        ) AS total_power,
        NULL::integer AS string_number,
        NULL::numeric AS string_current
    FROM public.tb_devices d
    INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
    WHERE dt.name = 'inverter'
      AND d.is_active = true
      AND d.power_plant_id IN (${power_plant_id})
      AND d.cabin IS NOT NULL
),
relay_data AS (
    SELECT
        d.cabin,
        d.power_plant_id,
        d.id as device_id,
        d.device_name,
        'relay' as device_type,
        COALESCE(ROUND(lr.active_power::numeric, 2), 0) AS active_power,
        COALESCE(
            (SELECT (discrete_data_json->>'breaker_position')::integer
             FROM dbt.stg_relay_discrete_data rd
             WHERE rd.device_id = d.id
             ORDER BY rd.timestamp DESC
             LIMIT 1),
            0
        ) AS state_simplified,
        NULL::numeric AS total_power,
        NULL::integer AS string_number,
        NULL::numeric AS string_current
    FROM public.tb_devices d
    INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
    LEFT JOIN dbt.int_relay_latest_readings lr ON lr.device_id = d.id
    WHERE dt.name = 'relay'
      AND d.is_active = true
      AND d.power_plant_id IN (${power_plant_id})
      AND d.cabin IS NOT NULL
),
logger_data AS (
    SELECT
        d.cabin,
        d.power_plant_id,
        d.id as device_id,
        d.device_name,
        'logger' as device_type,
        COALESCE(ROUND(lr.active_power::numeric, 2), 0) AS active_power,
        CASE WHEN COALESCE(lr.logger_state, 0) >= 1 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS state_simplified,
        NULL::numeric AS total_power,
        NULL::integer AS string_number,
        NULL::numeric AS string_current
    FROM public.tb_devices d
    INNER JOIN public.tb_devices_type dt ON d.device_type_id = dt.id
    LEFT JOIN dbt.int_logger_latest_readings lr ON lr.device_id = d.id
    WHERE dt.name = 'logger'
      AND d.is_active = true
      AND d.power_plant_id IN (${power_plant_id})
      AND d.cabin IS NOT NULL
),
string_data AS (
    SELECT
        d.cabin,
        s.power_plant_id,
        s.device_id,
        s.device_name,
        'string' as device_type,
        NULL::numeric AS active_power,
        CASE WHEN s.string_current >= 1 THEN 2 ELSE 0 END AS state_simplified,
        NULL::numeric AS total_power,
        s.string_number,
        ROUND(s.string_current::numeric, 2) AS string_current
    FROM dbt.stg_inverter_string_data s
    INNER JOIN public.tb_devices d ON d.id = s.device_id
    WHERE s.power_plant_id IN (${power_plant_id})
)
SELECT * FROM inverter_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM relay_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM logger_data
UNION ALL
SELECT * FROM string_data
ORDER BY cabin, device_type, device_id, string_number

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alarms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)
    power_plant_id,
    severity,
    type
  FROM dbt.int_events_alarms
  ORDER BY device_id, code, timestamp DESC
),
alarm_counts AS (
  SELECT 
    power_plant_id,
    COUNT(*) as high_alarms_count
  FROM latest_alarms
  WHERE type = 'alarm'
    AND LOWER(severity) = 'high'
  GROUP BY power_plant_id
)
SELECT 
  pp.id,
  pp.name as power_plant_name,
  pp.location,
  pp.location_lat as latitude,
  pp.location_long as longitude,
  pp.capacity,
  CASE 
    WHEN m.power_plant_status = 'offline' THEN 'critical'
    ELSE COALESCE(m.power_plant_status, 'unknown')
  END as status,
  COALESCE(m.active_power_kw, 0) as active_power_kw,
  COALESCE(ac.high_alarms_count, 0) as high_alarms_count
FROM public.tb_power_plants pp
LEFT JOIN dbt.mart_power_plants_overview m ON m.power_plant_id = pp.id
LEFT JOIN alarm_counts ac ON ac.power_plant_id = pp.id
WHERE pp.is_active = true
  AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR pp.id::TEXT = '${power_plant_id}')
ORDER BY pp.name

SELECT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' as timestamp,                                                                                                                                                                                   
    SUM(max_power) as active_power_kw                                                                                                                                                                                                          
  FROM (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    SELECT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
      timestamp,                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
      device_id,                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
      MAX(active_power) as max_power                                                                                                                                                                                                           
    FROM dbt.stg_inverter_analogic_data                                                                                                                                                                                                        
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)                                                                                                                                                                                                             
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}                                                                                                                                                                                                   
    GROUP BY timestamp, device_id                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  ) deduped                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  GROUP BY timestamp                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
  ORDER BY timestamp

SELECT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    timestamp AT TIME ZONE 'America/Sao_Paulo' as timestamp,                                                                                                                                                                                   
    AVG(irradiance_poa) as irradiance_poa                                                                                                                                                                                                      
  FROM (                                                                                                                                                                                                                                       
    SELECT                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
      timestamp,                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
      device_id,                                                                                                                                                                                                                               
      MAX(irradiance_poa) as irradiance_poa                                                                                                                                                                                                    
    FROM dbt.stg_weather_station_analogic_data                                                                                                                                                                                                 
    WHERE $__timeFilter(timestamp)                                                                                                                                                                                                             
      AND power_plant_id = ${power_plant_id}                                                                                                                                                                                                   
      AND irradiance_poa IS NOT NULL                                                                                                                                                                                                           
    GROUP BY timestamp, device_id                                                                                                                                                                                                              
  ) deduped                                                                                                                                                                                                                                    
  GROUP BY timestamp                                                                                                                                                                                                                           
  ORDER BY timestamp

options.content:
Active Alarms
{{#each data}} {{/each}}
Time Device Description Severity Action
{{this.hora}} {{this.device_name}} {{this.description}} {{this.severity}} {{#if this.acknowledged}}
{{this.acknowledged_at}} {{this.acknowledged_by}}
{{else}} {{/if}}
options.defaultContent: No high or medium severity alarms detected.

targets.rawSql:
WITH latest_alarms AS (
  SELECT DISTINCT ON (device_id, code)
    id,
    timestamp,
    power_plant_id,
    power_plant_name,
    device_id,
    device_name,
    code,
    value AS code_value,
    description,
    severity,
    acknowledged,
    acknowledged_at,
    acknowledged_by,
    type
  FROM dbt.int_events_alarms
  ORDER BY
    device_id,
    code,
    timestamp DESC
)
SELECT
  to_char(la.timestamp, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS hora,
  la.timestamp, 
  la.power_plant_id AS power_plant_id,
  la.power_plant_name AS name,
  la.device_id AS device,
  la.device_name AS device_name,
  la.code::TEXT AS code,
  la.code_value,
  la.description,
  la.severity,
  la.id::TEXT AS id,
  la.acknowledged,
  to_char(la.acknowledged_at, 'DD/MM/YYYY HH24:MI:SS') AS acknowledged_at,
  la.acknowledged_by,
  la.type
FROM latest_alarms la
WHERE la.type = 'alarm'
  AND ('${power_plant_id}' = 'All' OR la.power_plant_id::TEXT = '${power_plant_id}')
ORDER BY
  la.acknowledged ASC, 
  la.timestamp DESC    
LIMIT 300;

list.definition:
SELECT
  name AS __text,
  id   AS __value
FROM public.tb_power_plants
where is_active is true
ORDER BY name;
list.name: power_plant_id
list.query:
SELECT
  name AS __text,
  id   AS __value
FROM public.tb_power_plants
where is_active is true
ORDER BY name;
